prs.title: HubSpot sync: scheduler secret auth + App Runner HUBSPOT_SYNC_SECRET
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds secret-based authentication to the HubSpot sync route and propagates the new environment variable across multiple App Runner config files and env examples — modest but multi-file infrastructure wiring.

prs.title: Jp/api explore
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A single documentation file addition covering AWS API discovery and usage — useful reference material but no functional code changes.

stories.name: HubSpot Integration Security & Infrastructure Hardening
stories.rationale: Together these PRs establish secure authentication and infrastructure configuration for the HubSpot sync service, ensuring the integration runs safely and reliably in the App Runner environment.
